title: ceiba integrifolia
intro: Ceiba integrifolia, also known as the Mexican copal tree or the Kapok tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ceiba integrifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Ceiba integrifolia is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
